prompt: Create a hyper-realistic vertical lifestyle street portrait of a young East Asian woman in her mid-20s leaning casually against a graffiti-covered brick wall in an urban alley. She has long dark wavy hair, a natural real-human look with soft skin texture and subtle everyday makeup, and a relaxed confident pose. Her left shoulder and back rest on the wall, one leg crossed in front of the other, her left hand gently brushing or tucking her hair near her ear, and her right hand holding one clear plastic takeaway iced coffee cup with a black straw and tan iced latte inside. Outfit: a beige long trench coat worn open over a plain white fitted T-shirt, high-waisted light blue straight-leg jeans, and clean white sneakers, plus minimal jewelry including small hoop earrings and a delicate necklace. Setting: gritty brick wall covered with layered graffiti tags in black, white, teal, purple, and faded paint, sidewalk pavement, shallow depth of field with the wall receding into the background and a dark storefront or doorway on the right. Lighting: soft natural daylight, slightly overcast, realistic shadows, muted urban color palette. Composition: full-body portrait, subject centered slightly left, vertical 2:3 framing, camera at chest height, 50mm lifestyle photography feel, crisp focus on the subject with background blur. Keep exactly one person, one iced coffee cup, one visible straw, one trench coat, one white T-shirt, one pair of jeans, and one pair of white sneakers. Avoid text overlays, logos, watermarks, exaggerated glamour retouching, extra people, extra cups, or distorted hands.
